result.stdout:
Mzitu Download, Version 0.1.8

Usage: mzitudown [arguments] [options]

Arguments:
  Id            Required;Mzitu album id(e.g. https://www.mzitu.com/137224 id is 137224)

Options:
  -p|--path     Photo save path(default is the path where the current command executes)
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information
